commands.name: ssh
commands.message: The ssh_tunnels.sh helpers shell out to ssh; install openssh-client (or equivalent) inside the container.

commands.name: nc
commands.message: _assert_ports_are_available in ssh_tunnels.sh uses nc to probe local ports; install netcat-openbsd (or ncat / busybox netcat) inside the container.

commands.name: ip
commands.message: docker_container_aliases.sh's getHostIp() falls back to /sbin/ip route parsing when Docker Desktop hostnames are absent; install iproute2 (provides /sbin/ip).
